text: I'm going to be King of the Pirates! - Monkey D. Luffy, One Piece
Believe it! I never go back on my word, that is my nindo. - Naruto Uzumaki
The world isn't perfect. But it's there for us, doing the best it can, and that's what makes it so damn beautiful.
Whatever you lose, you'll find it again. But whatever you give away, you'll keep forever.
The pain of being alone is completely out of this world, isn't it? I don't know why, but I understand your feelings so much.
I hate so many things about the way that you treat me. You never take anything seriously. You treat everything like a game.
